title: Oh The Biomes You'll go  - Sandstone Recipe Fix
description: This datapack fixes the recipes of the colored sandstones and cut sandstones of Oh The Biomes You'll Go mod for Forge
body:
Add this datapack to the game to correct some crafting recipes, item tags and removing duplicate stonecutting recipes from the Oh The Biomes You'll go mod for the Forge modloader.

**Item Tags that were not found**

- Blue Sandstone
- White Sandstone
- Black Sandstone
- Purple Sandstone
- Pink Sandstone

**Missing crafting recipes**

- Blue Cut Sandstone
- White Cut Sandstone
- Black Cut Sandstone
- Purple Cut Sandstone
- Pink Cut Sandstone


This data pack is available for the following versions

- Minecraft 1.19.2
- Minecraft 1.19.3
- Minecraft 1.19.4

#### Oh The Biomes You'll Go

Oh The Biomes You'll Go mod for forge can be obtained [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo)

Credits to [AOCAWOL](https://modrinth.com/user/AOCAWOL) and [CorgiTaco](https://modrinth.com/user/CorgiTaco) for this awesome mod

Thanks to **Nycto** for detecting missing and duplicate colored cut sandstone recipes and an alternative solution to colored sand item tags.
